info.name: Dust Skills API
info.description:
List and import skill bundles into a Dust workspace.

Contact Support:
 Name: Dust Support

query.description: Filter skills by status. Defaults to active.

variable.description: (Required) Unique string identifier for the workspace

request.description: Retrieves the custom skills in the workspace. Active skills are returned by default.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Filter skills by status. Defaults to active.

response.name: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.
